descricao: On the last business day of the month, collects messages from Discord channels, summarizes them with AI and generates a formatted newsletter, with human approval before sending.
problema: Building the monthly newsletter required manually reading every channel, compiling and formatting — a process that took hours.
resultado: Newsletter generated automatically with a smart summary, ready for approval within minutes.
metrica: Automatic monthly generation with human approval
destaques: Automatic detection of the month's last business day
